stubs.name: curl_getenv
stubs.summary: Host environment access is forbidden during parsing.

stubs.name: curl_easy_escape
stubs.summary: Returns an input copy instead of libcurl percent-encoding.

stubs.name: curl_mime_filedata
stubs.summary: Form file upload would require external file IO.

stubs.name: curl_mime_data
stubs.summary: Captures form field presence without transfer execution.

stubs.name: curl_mime_data_cb
stubs.summary: Accepts callback registration without executing reads.

stubs.name: curl_mime_init
stubs.summary: Allocates an opaque placeholder for parse-only form capture.

stubs.name: curl_mime_addpart
stubs.summary: Allocates an opaque placeholder for parse-only form parts.

stubs.name: curl_url
stubs.summary: Allocates an opaque placeholder URL handle.

stubs.name: curl_url_set
stubs.summary: Accepts URL component assignment without network behavior.

stubs.name: curl_getdate
stubs.summary: Date parsing is not modeled and returns failure.

stubs.name: curl_strequal
stubs.summary: Case-insensitive string comparison mirrors needed behavior.

stubs.name: curl_strnequal
stubs.summary: Bounded case-insensitive string comparison mirrors needed behavior.

stubs.name: curl_slist_append
stubs.summary: Maintains ordered list data used by parser capture.
